name: refetch-from-key-vault
description: Fetch the credential from Key Vault again and re-run the failed credential test.

name: resume-instance
description: Resume the managed graph instance if the failure indicates the backing service is paused.

name: rotate-credential
description: Rotate the failed credential, update the secret store, and re-run the credential test.

name: recreate-instance
description: Recreate the managed service instance and provision replacement connection material.

name: pause-and-escalate
description: Stop automatic remediation and require a human operator decision.
